This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_channel[default]
  TypeError: subscribe() got an unexpected keyword argument 'user_contexts'
[FAIL] test_channel[with serializationOptions]
  TypeError: subscribe() got an unexpected keyword argument 'user_contexts'
[FAIL] test_channel[with ownership]
  TypeError: subscribe() got an unexpected keyword argument 'user_contexts'
Harness: the test ran to completion.
